name: io.github.SpartanLabsXyz/simmer-mcp
title: Simmer
description: Skill discovery, autoresearch experiments, and live trading on prediction markets (Polymarket, Kalshi, Simmer) for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: SIMMER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Simmer API key (sk_live_...) from simmer.markets/dashboard. Required for Pro tools (autoresearch, trading, briefings). Free tools work without it.

environmentVariables.name: SIMMER_MCP_ALLOW_LIVE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to allow live trading via simmer_trade. Without this, all trades run in paper/sim mode.
